channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jackson Criticizes Supreme Court Over Alleged Partiality
item.description: Justice Jackson and other liberal justices have been accused of exhibiting partiality, potentially impacting the court's impartiality.

item.title: Government Action and Competition in Spirit Airlines
item.description: An analysis of government enforcement actions and their impact on market competition.

item.title: Alito Responds to Jackson's Supreme Court Order Commentary
item.description: Justice Alito criticized a dissenting opinion regarding the court's recent decision, stating it lacked restraint and used inflammatory language.

item.title: Lina Khan Assumes New Role at Columbia
item.description: The former FTC chair will continue her work at Columbia University.
